body:
## Problem

The /articles/<slug> SSR handler has two paths:
1. ALBUM_ARTICLES (60 entries, line 570-597): Returns breadcrumbSchema — covered
2. ARTICLE_METADATA (8 entries, line 546-564): Returns Article schema but NO breadcrumbSchema

The 8 ARTICLE_METADATA overrides (hand-tuned editorial articles) are missing BreadcrumbList from SSR while the 60 ALBUM_ARTICLES have it. This is an inconsistency — same page type, different schema completeness.

## Fix

File: api/meta/[...path].js, articleMeta return block (line 547-564)

Add breadcrumbSchema to the existing return:
  breadcrumbSchema: [
    { name: 'Home', url: BASE_URL },
    { name: 'Articles', url: BASE_URL + '/articles' },
    { name: articleMeta.headline, url: BASE_URL + '/articles/' + articleSlug },
  ]

articleMeta.headline is already in scope (line 548). No new data needed.

## Status

ALREADY SHIPPED — fix was applied in commit 6b85758 (fix: #1400 add breadcrumbSchema to ARTICLE_METADATA SSR handler). The breadcrumbSchema [Home, Articles, Article Title] is present at lines 843-847 of api/meta/[...path].js. No code change needed; run record only.
title: SEO: ARTICLE_METADATA entries (8 articles) — BreadcrumbList JSON-LD missing from SSR
